'''ngayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pungently|pungently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pungently|pungently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngayate|ngayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngayatesher|ngayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayatesherĂ«m|ngayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngayatero|ngayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngayateshĂ«|ngayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayateshĂ«m|ngayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingayatero|gokingayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingayateshĂ«|gokingayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayateshĂ«m|gokingayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongayankerom|gongayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongayankeshĂ«|gongayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayankeshĂ«m|gongayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongayankeya|gongayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngayaterom|ngayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayatemu|ngayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngayateya|ngayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingayaterom|gokingayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayatemu|gokingayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingayateya|gokingayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngayayate|ngayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngayayatesher|ngayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayayatesherĂ«m|ngayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngayayatero|ngayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngayayateshĂ«|ngayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayayateshĂ«m|ngayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingayayatero|gokingayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingayayateshĂ«|gokingayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayayateshĂ«m|gokingayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongayayankerom|gongayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongayayankeshĂ«|gongayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayayankeshĂ«m|gongayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongayayankeya|gongayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngayayaterom|ngayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayayatemu|ngayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngayayateya|ngayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingayayaterom|gokingayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayayatemu|gokingayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingayayateya|gokingayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠte|ngĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠtesher|ngĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠtero|ngĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠtero|gokingĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠterom|ngĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠtemu|ngĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠyĂŠteya|ngĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠterom|gokingĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠyĂŠteya|gokingĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafyafte|ngafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafyaftesher|ngafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafyaftesherĂ«m|ngafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafyaftero|ngafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafyafteshĂ«|ngafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafyafteshĂ«m|ngafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafyaftero|gokingafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafyafteshĂ«|gokingafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafyafteshĂ«m|gokingafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafyafnkerom|gongafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafyafnkeshĂ«|gongafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafyafnkeshĂ«m|gongafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafyafnkeya|gongafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafyafterom|ngafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafyaftemu|ngafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafyafteya|ngafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafyafterom|gokingafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafyaftemu|gokingafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafyafteya|gokingafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
